creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
I'm following recent updates (to prepare Xfce 4.10), and I saw this commit.

2012/4/17 Rodrigo OSORIO <rodrigo@bebik.net>:
> Hi,
>
> I want to inform you that the xfce project just merge the
> freebsd patch submited in this PR into their HEAD.
>
> See the link below :
> http://git.xfce.org/panel-plugins/xfce4-battery-plugin/commit/?id=5fdc701440f97cee111a2a47c85f7d838aab7e13
>
> Future versions of xfce probably doesn't require this patch anymore.
>
> Regards,
>
> - Rodrigo
>
>
> _______________________________________________
> freebsd-xfce@freebsd.org mailing list
> http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-xfce
> To unsubscribe, send any mail to "freebsd-xfce-unsubscribe@freebsd.org"



-- 
olivier
